mapper.select: SELECT bts.account_id AS accountId, im.company_name AS bankName, lba.account_name AS accountName FROM budget_transfer_settings bts JOIN linked_bank_accounts lba ON lba.id = bts.account_id JOIN linked_institutions li ON li.id = lba.institution_id JOIN institution_master im ON im.id = li.institution_master_id WHERE bts.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO budget_transfer_settings (user_id, account_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{accountId}, NOW(), NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE account_id = #{accountId}, updated_at = NOW()
